notes: Copy library seeded per D008. error_copy.md has 8 canonical keys + per-page empty-state variants. copy.md carries the platform-wide brand rules (tone, headings, buttons, numbers formatting, character-name spellings). Frontend: implement the withStates() helper in pages.py as three constants (_SKELETON_CSS + _ERROR_COPY_JS + _WITH_STATES_JS) and extend _NAV to include 3 new pills (Performance / Squad / Research). Every consuming page pastes the three constants into its <style> and <script> blocks.
review_criteria: withStates() takes (box, fetcher, renderer, opts) and branches on outcome
Renderer returning 'empty' swaps to empty-state affordance
Retry button re-invokes fetcher then re-renders
Default skeleton helper covers KPI + chart + rows layout (F001 baseline)
Nav extension keeps existing pill tests green
